emails.subject: Flight details
emails.body: Flight details Departure: February 9th at 9:20 a.m. arrives Denver 10:40 a.m. (flight #799) Return: February 16th at 4:35 p.m. arrives Houston 7:55 p.m. (flight #1098) Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen 713.853.4220 office 713.646.8562 fax 713.253.2131 mobile
